html:
Exclusive to:

Bean Bugs are a Food Item exclusive to the Hamlet DLC. They can be found under Stone Slabs. Eating them raw or cooked will restore Hunger, but at the cost of Sanity loss.

Cooking three Bean Bugs and any Meat in the Crock Pot makes Feijoada.

Webber and Wilba can eat Bean Bugs without the Sanity Penalty. Wilba will turn into a Werepig after eating two Bean Bugs.

Cooked Bean Bugs

Cooked Bean Bugs are a Food item made by Cooking Bean Bugs on a Campfire, Fire Pit, or other viable source of fire. Much like its counterpart the Gummy Slug, it is not a practical food item to cook and eat as it takes a significant amount of its superior spoil time away, still damages sanity and has inferior hunger restoration compared to the crock pot item that is made from Bean Bugs.

Trivia

  • Bean bugs may be inspired by the real life "Mexican jumping beans"
  • According to Wickerbottom, Bean Bugs are beans that resemble bugs
    • Despite this, Bean Bugs have a food value of 1 "bug", rather than "vegetable"
By TypeBy Crock Pot Value

“Beans. With legs.”
–Wilson

–Willow
“Is look like food with legs.”
–Wolfgang
“Your life is as insignificant as mine.”
–Wendy
“NATURE IS ANOMALOUS”
–WX-78
“Goodness! A walking Fabaceae!”
–Wickerbottom
“That's a funny little guy.”
–Woodie
“Excitable little creatures, aren't they?”
–Maxwell
“These would most certainly cause intestinal distress.”
–Wagstaff
“Föur legged fööd.”
–Wigfrid
“These guys look neat!”
–Webber
“You sure do have a lot of energy.”
–Walani
“Jumping jelly beans!”
–Warly
“Avast ye, jumpin' beans!”
–Woodlegs
“MOST FOUL, STRANGE, AND UNNATURAL”
–Wilba
“Jumpies”
–Wormwood
“Bugs or beans or something in between?”
–Wheeler

“I'm not sure I should eat those.”

“Ugh. Does not look appetizing.”
–Warly
“The virtue of this meat be dubious.”
–Woodlegs
“FWOOSH'DED JUMPY BUG”
–Wilba
“Why not jumping?”
–Wormwood
“How adventurous am I feeling today?”
–Wheeler

summaryViHtml:
Tóm tắt

Bọ Đậu là một Vật Phẩm Thực Phẩm độc quyền trong Hamlet DLC. Chúng có thể được tìm thấy dưới Stone Slabs. Ăn sống hoặc nấu chín sẽ phục hồi Sức Đói, nhưng phải trả giá là mất Tinh Thần.

'''Bean Bugs''' are a [[Food]] [[Items|Item]] exclusive to the ''[[Don't Starve: Hamlet|Hamlet]]'' DLC. They can be found under [[Stone Slab]]s. Eating them raw or cooked will restore [[Hunger]], but at the cost of [[Sanity]] loss.

Cooking three Bean Bugs and any [[Meats|Meat]] in the [[Crock Pot]] makes [[Feijoada]].

[[Webber]] and [[Wilba]] can eat Bean Bugs without the Sanity Penalty. Wilba will turn into a [[Werepig]] after eating two Bean Bugs.
